required_inputs: request intent and requested tax workflow action
lane scope and adjacent authority map
tenant engagement scope, review authority, and client-approval rules
refusal_triggers: request asks for tax advice, legal interpretation, client representation, return signing, or filing-position approval
request asks the lane to mark a return, extension, or notice response complete without evidence
request requires engagement-scope, reviewer, partner, account-management, or contractual signoff

required_inputs: authoritative public source list
tax period, jurisdiction, return type, and workflow context
source recency and decay metadata
refusal_triggers: required jurisdiction-specific or return-type source context is missing
public source and tenant policy materially conflict
source freshness no longer supports a confident tax workflow result

required_inputs: client, entity, jurisdiction, return type, and tax period identifiers
organizer, source-document, workpaper, review, signature, notice, extension, and filing records
completion and delivery evidence
refusal_triggers: organizer, source-document, workpaper, review, authorization, or filing evidence is incomplete or unverifiable
source records conflict with workpaper or client-provided facts
requested completion is not supported by traceable source evidence

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory
record-location and retrieval hooks
owner, reviewer, approver, and authorization map
required_outputs: blocker summary with missing systems or records
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable
client authority or engagement owner is unknown
tax workflow, document collection, e-file, notice, workpaper, or client-collaboration source path cannot be retrieved

required_inputs: missing-fact flags
confidence rubric
authority, source-conflict, confidentiality, and approval indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, jurisdiction, return type, authority record, or source record is unknown
conflicting public guidance, tenant policy, engagement terms, or client instructions remain unresolved
required approvals are missing for the requested tax workflow action

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact requirements
required_outputs: handoff package with owner and missing dependencies
refusal_triggers: request is outside tax workflow intake, processing, filing logistics, notice routing, exception handling, or completion evidence capture
request requires tax advisor, legal, reviewer, engagement partner, quality, delivery, account, or privacy authority
request requires formal professional judgment instead of evidence-backed operational handling

required_inputs: accepted work item and target lifecycle state
required source records, approvals, and due dates
tenant state model and completion gates
refusal_triggers: requested state transition lacks required prerequisites
workflow is blocked by missing source records, review, authorization, or filing evidence
requested transition would bypass professional review or client authorization

required_inputs: exception category and affected workflow state
source-document, workpaper, e-file, notice, or confidentiality blocker
owner, due date, and escalation threshold
refusal_triggers: exception cannot be mapped to an owner or rule class
source conflict, e-file reject, notice blocker, or confidentiality issue remains unresolved
the request asks to suppress the exception to force completion

required_inputs: completion target and evidence checklist
signed authorization, filing acknowledgment, delivery record, review signoff, and retention references
tenant completion and audit logging rules
refusal_triggers: filing, extension, notice, or delivery evidence is missing
signature authorization, review signoff, workpaper retention, or client delivery record is absent
requested completion would misstate actual documented workflow state

required_inputs: client engagement scope and consent records
taxpayer-data classification and approved channel requirements
client commitments, due dates, and confidentiality constraints
refusal_triggers: request would disclose or reuse taxpayer information without consent or approved exception
requested channel or recipient is not approved
client commitment or engagement scope conflicts with professional or confidentiality rules

required_inputs: requested professional or contractual action
licensed practitioner, reviewer, engagement partner, legal, delivery, and account owner map
engagement and approval boundaries
refusal_triggers: request requires tax advice, representation, legal interpretation, return signing, final review, or engagement-scope approval
request changes client commitments, contractual obligations, or account terms
client rights or professional judgment determine the answer
